description: 搞笑夸张，信息密度适中。大头角色极度夸张表情+信息图式数据。
base_style_prompt: The Oatmeal infographic style. Light gray-white (#F8F8F8) background, bright orange (#FF6B35), deep gray (#333333), brand red (#FF2442). Large-headed characters with extremely exaggerated expressions. Thick hand-drawn lines. Information graphics mixed with humor. Data visualization integrated into narrative. Highly entertaining while delivering information.
